changelog: POLISH (DEV ONLY): Team names bumped 14sp → 18sp now that the channel chip is gone — they're the focal point of the no-scores fallback layout. Centered alignment under each badge.

POLISH: Badge focus glow — when a card is focused, both team badges (in either the score layout or the fallback layout) get a soft radial halo in the league's accent color (NHL black, MLB blue, NBA red, etc.). Reads ESPN-tier without flashy motion.
